calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jul-20-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 for Short Cause Trial (No appearance by Defendant(s).
Department 514, Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6840.

Scott A. Gursky, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff L.A. COMMERCIAL GROUP, INC., a Corporatin, dba CONTINENTAL COMMERCIAL GROUP.
No appearance on behalf or by Defendant(s) PAUL CURTIS NEEL, individually , dba TRIBE HARDSCAPES (Request to enter default on 1/10/2015/); PETER MCNABB, an individual.
Marcie Knapp sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff.
After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff and against Defendant as follows:
Principal $16,189.28
Pre-Judgment Interest $4,897.87
Attorney's Fees $1,950.00
Costs $812.25
Total Judgment in the amount of $23,849.40
Judgment signed in open court.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Jul-20-2015 Assigned To Trial Court

Notice Of Motion And Motion That Matters Requested To Be Admitted In Plaintiffs First Set Of Requests
Off Calendar Apr-13-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Scott Gursky of The Law Offices of Scott A. Gursky telephone number 415-398-0298 for Plaintiff.

No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. Counsel for the Plaintiff stipulated to the Judge Pro Tem. The Court adopted the tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF L.A. COMMERCIAL GROUP, INC.'S Motion That Matters Requested To Be Admitted In Plaintiffs First Set Of Requests is granted, for reasons set forth in motion, which is unopposed. Sanctions in the amount of $300 are awarded against defendant Peter McNabb. Order signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Katherine Huibonhoa. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-09-2015 Set For Trial On Jul-20-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206
